message:
fix: update goreleaser owner to gastownhall (repo moved from steveyegge)

The GitHub uploads API returns 307 redirects for the old owner, which
goreleaser cannot follow. Update release and brew tap owner references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -157,7 +157,7 @@ archives:
 brews:
   - name: bd
     repository:
-      owner: steveyegge
+      owner: gastownhall
       name: homebrew-beads
       token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}"
     directory: Formula
@@ -199,7 +199,7 @@ changelog:
 
 release:
   github:
-    owner: steveyegge
+    owner: gastownhall
     name: beads
   draft: false
   prerelease: auto
